theme: 'The aDNA Network' homepage hero — first concrete instance of the SS Ghibli-pixel brand pivot (ADR-032): image-led hero + live Space-Grotesk-Bold title; multi-agent gen->review->refine loop
register: ss_ghibli_pixel / tokyo_night (#1a1b26 base, #9d7cd8 purple, #7dcfff cyan, #e0a84c warm accent)
change_summary: Generated the new image-led homepage hero under the SS Ghibli-pixel register. Cloned the m53_cycle_102 Imagen runner with the SS Ghibli style tail + Tokyo Night palette + 4 seed directions (D1-D4). R1 exploration (8 requested; 6 produced — D1 cozy-desk filtered by person_generation=dont_allow) on Imagen 4 Fast. Adversarial 5-persona review (multi-agent Workflow): Visual Designer, Brand Strategist, Newcomer, Illustration/Motion, Movement Skeptic — each scored all 6 head-to-head. Winner D4 (isometric connected-vaults), mean 4.14; runner-up D2 constellation 3.46 (wins the 3-second network read but cold/clinical); D3 helix dropped. R2 regen of D4 on Imagen 4 Ultra with 7 synthesized refinement notes (hub-and-spoke topology, vaults spaced as discrete nodes, darkened upper title band, palette lock, keep human figures). Final = r2_D4_v1. Rewired HomeHero.astro image-led: title-image leads the fold with a live 'The aDNA Network' Space-Grotesk-Bold title (cmux shadow finish) over the darkened upper band — REVERSES the c2 banner_vs_words:DEMOTE; index.astro swapped aDNABanner -> heroImage. Surrounding chrome keeps v2 tokens (no palette reskin — gated on ADR-032).

review_panel.method: multi-agent Workflow (operator opt-in); 5 personas x 6 candidates head-to-head + synthesis
review_panel.runner_up: D2_v1 (constellation — Newcomer 4.8 instant-network read; folded into the D4 R2 refinement)
review_panel.dropped: D3 (DNA-helix direction; barely reads as a network)

doctrine_compliance.image_led_hero: NEW legal above-fold mode per ADR-032 §front_page_doctrine revision — title-image leads the fold; DOM order confirms hero-stage(img+title) before hero-lead before hero-actions
doctrine_compliance.title_not_below_subtitles: satisfied — reverses c2 DEMOTE; live h1 'The aDNA Network' sits in the image's upper band, above the manifesto lead + CTAs (operator directive)
doctrine_compliance.live_text_title: Space Grotesk Bold (var(--font-display)) + cmux shadow finish + soft cyan glow, composited as real <h1> text, NOT baked into the gen (a11y + responsive + accessible name)
doctrine_compliance.no_baked_text: gen prompts carry strict NO-TEXT clause; winner verified text-free
doctrine_compliance.palette_discipline: image carries the new Tokyo Night register; site tokens UNCHANGED (teal/amber v2) until visual-identity-v3 ratifies — gate-respecting
doctrine_compliance.a11y: descriptive image alt (scene, not duplicating the title); top-down navy scrim guarantees AA title contrast independent of asset; no motion added (static hero, motion budget untouched)

validation.astro_build: PASS — 161 pages, ~5.6s, 0 errors (built twice: placeholder then final Ultra asset)
validation.visual_desktop: 1280px screenshot — live title leads the fold over the darkened band; hub-and-spoke network reads instantly; manifesto+CTAs below; rounded stage + glow
validation.visual_mobile: 390px screenshot — title legible over image; image->lead->CTAs->trust->stats flow; no horizontal overflow
validation.persona_qa: R1 adversarial 5-persona panel ran THIS cycle (winner selection); full decadal Reviewer Lens Pass (30 personas) remains at cycle 10

image_gen.model_r1: imagen-4.0-fast-generate-001 (Ultra + standard were 429 RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED 'temporarily out of capacity' at gen time; Fast had capacity)
image_gen.model_r2_final: imagen-4.0-ultra-generate-001 (capacity returned; final winner is Ultra fidelity)

deploy: NOT deployed — broad reskin + live deploy gated on operator ratification of ADR-032 (operator gate at session close)
notes: Cycle 6 of E1, first cycle under the SS Ghibli-pixel pivot. Adaptations logged: (1) interpreter is python3.13 (google.genai in 3.13 user site, NOT homebrew 3.14); (2) added retry/backoff + --model to the runner for transient Imagen 429s; (3) D1 cozy-desk direction filtered by person_generation=dont_allow — D2/D3/D4 sufficed. Imagen native widest aspect is 16:9 (21:9 not supported); hero band crops visually via CSS. Candidate PNGs kept local (not committed — heavy); provenance in the image_gen_log + review aggregate above. GATE: ADR-032 is status:proposed — operator decides ratify-now vs defer-to-phase-exit before broad reskin (visual-identity-v3 + front_page_doctrine rewrite) + deploy. Remaining E1: cycles 7-10 (reskin in the new register) + cycle-10 decadal AAR + 30-persona Reviewer Lens Pass.
